path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali and Aqa ﷺ were made from one light.png
text: Al-Khigal Book 2, Chapter 98 The Prophet and Ali Ibn Abi Talib Were Created from One Light 1 Hadith Hadith #1 1108 Muhammad ibn Uar al-Hafiz a- Baghdady narrated that Abu el ] gt 18 531l Bl o5 e o 1108 ‘Muhammad al-Hassan ibn Abdullah al-Razi quoted on the authority T 1o 15 ] g5 15 sl el ofhisfther, on the authority o his maste Al b M al-Ridha e 1 o g gho 0l ghao S il s o1 (MGB), on the authority ofhis father Musa bn Jafar al-Kadhim ol 90 B e 0 e 328 e 1 ape o 0018 (MGB), on the authority of his father Ja'far ibn Muhammad as-Sadiq U8 gl f 20528 el 03 Jo f 39008 o o dne (MGB), on the authority of his father Muhammad ibn Ali al-Bagir I b gl J 595 18 s o1 ol 3T 5 R R T T T —— bl b o on o ol 208 o i el 30 (MGE), on the authority of his father Al-Hussein (MGE), on the all ale ol o ol Jyy J8:J8 authority of his brother Al-Hassan ibn Ali (MGE), on the authority of his father Ali ibn Abi Talib (MGB) that God's Prophet (MGE) said, Soly 15 om sy Ul s “Ali and 1 were created from the same light”
